title: PENDING_AUTH Message
description: RCAN message type 10. Human-in-the-Loop (HiTL) gate notification (§16). Emitted by the RCAN runtime when an AI-generated COMMAND is held pending human authorisation because it matched a hitl_gates rule. The human operator must respond with an AUTHORIZE message before the gated command expires.

message_type.description: Identifies this as a PENDING_AUTH message.

ruri.description: Target robot's RURI — the robot that would execute the gated command.

thought_id.description: Unique identifier for the AI reasoning trace that produced the original_command. Must be echoed in the responding AUTHORIZE message.

original_command.description: The full COMMAND message that is being held for human review.

confidence.description: The AI model's self-reported confidence score (0–1) for the proposed action. Values below the configured confidence_gate threshold triggered this HiTL review.

model_id.description: Identifier of the AI model that generated the original command, e.g. 'openai/gpt-4o-mini' or 'anthropic/claude-sonnet-4'.

requires_auth_from_role.description: Minimum role_level a human operator must hold to authorise this action.

expires_at_ms.description: Unix epoch time in milliseconds by which an AUTHORIZE message must arrive. If not received in time, the original_command is discarded per the hitl_gates on_timeout policy.

timestamp_ms.description: Unix epoch time in milliseconds when the PENDING_AUTH was emitted.

message_id.description: UUIDv4 uniquely identifying this PENDING_AUTH message.
